seo.title: Healthcare Assistant Agency in London | Vigil Care Staffing
seo.description: Vigil Care Staffing supplies qualified, CQC-compliant healthcare assistants across London. Rapid deployment for care homes, NHS sites, and supported living facilities.

nap.address: Ferguson House, 113 Cranbrook Road, Ilford IG1 4PU

fields.heading: Healthcare Assistant Agency in London
fields.sub: Vigil Care Staffing is a healthcare assistant agency supplying fully vetted, experienced HCAs to care homes, supported living services and healthcare sites across Greater London.

image.alt: A smiling carer in blue scrubs crouches beside an elderly woman in a wheelchair outdoors in a leafy park.

fields.image_alt: A smiling carer in blue scrubs crouches beside an elderly woman in a wheelchair outdoors in a leafy park.

fields.heading: A healthcare assistant agency built around your rota
fields.body:
Finding reliable healthcare assistants at short notice is one of the hardest parts of running a care service. Vigil Care Staffing is a healthcare assistant agency that supplies experienced, fully vetted HCAs to care homes, nursing homes, supported living services and healthcare sites across Greater London.

We cover single shifts, block bookings and longer placements, matching each healthcare assistant to your setting and to the needs of the people you support. Whether you are filling an unexpected absence or planning ahead for busier periods, we help keep your rota safely staffed.

Vigil Care Staffing is a staffing supplier rather than a regulated care provider. Our job is to give your service dependable people who are ready to work and integrate smoothly with your team.

image.alt: Healthcare Assistant Agency staff working in London care home

fields.image_alt: Healthcare Assistant Agency staff working in London care home

items.title: Same-day staffing
items.body: Our coordination team can respond to urgent requests and arrange cover quickly when a shift falls through, drawing on a local pool of available HCAs.

items.title: Personalised matching
items.body: We match healthcare assistants to your setting and requirements rather than sending whoever is nearest, so the fit works for your team and your residents.

items.title: Specialist-trained HCAs
items.body: Our healthcare assistants bring relevant experience and confirmed training, including specialist skills where your service needs them.

items.title: Round-the-clock coordination
items.body: Our team coordinates bookings across days, nights and weekends, so cover is arranged when you actually need it.

items.title: Quick onboarding
items.body: Digital rostering and a streamlined onboarding process mean confirmed healthcare assistants can start with minimal delay.

items.title: Local knowledge
items.body: We understand care settings across Greater London and place HCAs who can reach your service reliably, shift after shift.

fields.heading: Compliance and vetting standards
fields.body:
Every healthcare assistant is enhanced-DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and reference-checked before their first shift. We confirm mandatory training certificates and interview candidates through our compliance team, keeping records current through ongoing professional development.

Our recruitment follows a CQC-compliant process that supports your own safe-staffing evidence. Because our HCAs are directly employed, responsibility for their vetting and conduct remains with us throughout every placement.

image.alt: Healthcare Assistant Agency staff working in London care home

fields.image_alt: Healthcare Assistant Agency staff working in London care home

items.a: We supply healthcare assistants across Greater London. Share your location and setting and we will confirm availability in your area.

items.q: How quickly can you arrange urgent cover?
items.a: Our coordination team responds quickly to urgent requests and will be clear about what cover we can arrange for your shift and setting.

items.q: What vetting do your healthcare assistants have?
items.a: Each healthcare assistant is enhanced-DBS-checked, right-to-work verified and reference-checked, with mandatory training confirmed before they start.
Once you share your requirements, our coordination team confirms availability, matches suitable healthcare assistants to your setting and arranges the shifts around your rota.
